---
title: "Aaron Gallant"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.profile-photo}
![](../Images/Members/aaron-gallant.jpg)
:::

Ph.D. Geotechnical Engineering, P.E.

### Biography
Detailed description here.

Detailed description here.

Detailed description here.
